about.text: Hello! I'm Alaisa, a miniature painter who brings tiny worlds to life with brush and paint. What started as a hobby has become a passion — each piece is a labor of love, painted with care and attention to every tiny detail.

gallery.title: Space Marine Captain
gallery.description: Custom color scheme with NMM gold details

gallery.description: Ethereal glow effect on the weapon
